mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_sessions (user_id, session_id, title, message_count, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{title}, 0, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_sessions
title = #{title}, message_count = #{messageCount}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (user_id, session_id, role, content, model, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{model}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
